_description: Operations/maintenance submenu options, externalized from actions.gd get_operations_options() (L9, #621). Dictionary key order matches the pre-L9 literals.

actions.name: Order Office Supplies
actions.description: Restock stationery (+50 supplies). Staff consume supplies each turn.

actions.name: Office Maintenance
actions.description: Routine repairs and cleaning. Improves morale slightly.
